title: Create: Skies & Beyond
description: Using mods such as Clockwork and Create: North Star along side the Create mod to create cars to zoom across the ground, planes to soar through the skies, and rocket ships to travel through space!
body:
![Title of modpack; "Create: Skies & Beyond".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad50aa2939e2fba91e8c349f49b8555f6ca9dc58.png)

ℹ️**ABOUT**ℹ️

Using mods such as Clockwork and Create: North Star along side the Create mod to create cars to zoom across the ground, planes to soar through the skies, and rocket ships to travel through space!

⚙️**MODS**⚙️

Here's a list of some of the mods included.

- Trackwork: Using this mod, you'll have the power of wheels and tracks, to make tanks, cars, bikes & more!
- Clockwork: Using this mod, along with others, you can make planes to soar through skies or to bomb your enimies base!
- PointBlank: With guns galore, taking care of a zombie has never been easier! With simple recipes and easy keybinds, it's easy make and use a zombie destroying machine!
- ModernFix: A simple mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs.
- Physics mod: A fun mod, added just make thins a little bit more destructive ;).

🎉**SO WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR**🎉

Come join the party!

Sub to my YT Account for anything suggestions or just to hang oyt with videos of create! https://www.youtube.com/@Ballpark_Creations
